gems.name: Rigwald's Ferocity
keyStats: Weapon Set I: 30% increased Attack Speed, 15% less Damage
Weapon Set II: 10% reduced Attack Speed, 30% more Damage
gems.whyPowerful: Lets attack builds use two distinct modes on demand — fast clear speed via Set I, then burst single-target via Set II. The 30% more Damage in Set II is a multiplicative modifier, stacking with all other damage bonuses.

gems.name: Seraph's Heart
keyStats: Supports Persistent Buff Skills (Heralds, Auras, Defensive Buffs)
Enemy Hits have 20% chance to treat all your Resistances as being 90% while a Supported Skill is active
Spirit Reservation: 45
gems.whyPowerful: A 20% chance to effectively cap all resistances at 90% for a hit is a significant damage reduction layer. Works with any persistent buff skill — Heralds, Auras, Arctic Armour — no specific playstyle required.

gems.name: Breachlord's Rift
keyStats: Supported Skills Break 50% of Armour when Freezing or Electrocuting targets
Fully Broken Armour inflicted with Supported Skills also increases Cold and Lightning Damage Taken from Hits
Mana Cost: 100%
gems.whyPowerful: Breaking 50% armour on every freeze or electrocute is an enormous penetration effect. Fully Broken Armour adds additional damage-taken multiplier. Best in slot for any cold or lightning build that can reliably freeze or electrocute.

gems.name: Ixchel's Torment
keyStats: Triggered skills deal between 40% less and 60% more Damage (random per trigger)
Triggered skills gain between 40% less and 50% more Area of Effect (random per trigger)
Triggered skills gain between 40% less and 50% more Projectile Speed (random per trigger)
Cost Multiplier: 120%
gems.whyPowerful: On lucky rolls, triggered skills deal 60% more damage and have 50% larger area — enormous bonuses. For builds using many triggered skills per second, the average outcome is net positive due to how often peak rolls occur in rapid succession.

gems.name: Uhtred's Constellation
keyStats: Supported Skills have 50% less Cooldown Recovery Rate
Supported Non-Instant Skills have +2 Cooldown Uses
Supported Skills deal 8% more Damage for each different Skill with a Cooldown you have used in the last 8 seconds
Mana Cost: 100%
gems.whyPowerful: +2 Cooldown Uses means you can use a cooldown skill 3 times before waiting. 8% more damage per cooldown skill used rewards running multiple cooldown abilities — 4 active cooldown skills = 32% more damage.

gems.name: Sione's Temper
keyStats: Gain 1 Wildshard on casting Supported Spells
20% chance to fire 8 additional Projectiles in a circle per Wildshard
All Wildshards reset when Supported Skills fire Projectiles in a circle
Compatible with Firebolt, Spark, Arc, Fireball, and 19+ others
gems.whyPowerful: Accumulating Wildshards builds to a chance to fire a massive 8-projectile circle burst — covers 360° around the player. Outstanding for mapping: the circle burst clears packs in all directions simultaneously.

gems.name: Uhtred's Exodus
keyStats: +3 to Level of Supported Skills if no other Supports are modifying them
Requires the supported skill to have zero other support gems
Mana Cost: 100%
gems.whyPowerful: +3 gem levels is a massive scaling bonus on skills where gem level is the primary damage driver (Spark, Ball Lightning, Arc). Trades all other support benefits for raw power — best for builds where the skill itself is inherently strong.

gems.name: Uhtred's Omen
keyStats: +2 to Level of Supported Skills if exactly one other Support is modifying them
Mana Cost: 100%
gems.whyPowerful: +2 gem levels with one other support gem gives more flexibility than Exodus — you can still add a powerful support. Ideal pairing: Uhtred's Omen + one high-value generic support (e.g. Added Lightning Damage, Concentrated Effect).

gems.name: Uhtred's Augury
keyStats: +2 to Level of Supported Skills if exactly two other Supports are modifying them
Mana Cost: 100%
gems.whyPowerful: The most flexible of the Uhtred trio — +2 gem levels alongside two other supports, allowing a conventional 3-support setup while still gaining the Lineage gem level boost.

gems.name: Rakiata's Flow
keyStats: Hits with Supported Skills treat Enemy Monster Elemental Resistance values as inverted
Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits (269 compatible skills)
Mana Cost: 120%
gems.whyPowerful: 'Inverted' means an enemy with 50% fire resistance is instead treated as having -50% fire resistance — a 100-percentage-point swing. One of the highest flat damage multipliers against resistant enemies; BiS for elemental hit builds without penetration stacking.

gems.name: Zarokh's Refrain
keyStats: Supported Spells Echo 3 times
Echoes from Supported Spells have 40% increased Area of Effect
Cooldown Time: 5.00 seconds
Mana Cost: 130%
gems.whyPowerful: 3 echoes = 4 casts per trigger — a 4× hits-per-cast multiplier for elemental damage, ailment buildup, and on-hit effects. The 40% increased AoE on echoes fills larger areas progressively. Outperforms standard Spell Echo for builds that can accommodate the cooldown.

gems.name: Dominus' Grasp
keyStats: Supported Skills Chain 100% more times
Supports Projectile skills and skills that Chain
Mana Cost: 100%
gems.whyPowerful: Doubling chain count dramatically increases enemies hit per cast — essential for clear-speed chain builds. 100% more chains is multiplicative — a skill that chains 3 times base now chains 6 times. Universal value for bow, wand, and chain-spell builds.

gems.name: Dialla's Desire
keyStats: +1 to Level of Supported Skill Gems
+5% to Quality of Supported Skills
Cost Multiplier: 90% (reduces cost)
Reservation Multiplier: 90% (reduces reservation)
gems.whyPowerful: A net-positive gem in almost every slot — adds gem level and quality while reducing both cost and reservation. The 90% reservation multiplier makes it valuable for aura and persistent buff builds where reducing spirit cost is critical.

gems.name: Eonyr's Thunder
keyStats: Lightning damage from Supported Skills can inflict Electrocute
Supported Skills Cannot inflict Shock (Electrocute replaces Shock)
Electrocuted enemies explode via Voltaic Fulmination on death: 5–14% max life as Lightning damage, 1.5–2.1m radius
gems.whyPowerful: Electrocute is a stronger crowd-control effect than Shock — enemies are paralysed entirely. The corpse explosion chains through packs. Synergises directly with Breachlord's Rift (break armour on electrocute).

gems.name: Esh's Prowess
keyStats: +1 to Level of Supported Lightning Skills
Supported Skills only roll the minimum or maximum Damage value for Lightning Damage
Mana Cost: 100%
gems.whyPowerful: +1 gem level is a free damage boost. Rolling only min or max lightning damage removes variable middle values — in practice, lightning skills that roll consistently at their maximum deal significantly higher average damage.

gems.name: Arakaali's Lust
keyStats: 8% more Damage with Hits for each Poison on the Enemy, up to 40%
Mana Cost: 100%
gems.whyPowerful: On a target with 5 poisons, this is a 40% more Damage multiplier — significant multiplicative bonus. Unlike most poison supports, this affects Hit damage, not poison damage — meaning it benefits fast-hit builds that apply many poisons quickly.

gems.name: Tecrod's Revenge
keyStats: Minions from Supported Skills die 20 seconds after their Life is reduced to 0
Minions from Supported Skills gain Soul Eater when their Life is reduced to 0
Minions gain 40% increased Attack and Cast Speed when their Life is reduced to 0
gems.whyPowerful: Minions that would die instead enter a 20-second 'last gasp' mode with Soul Eater — they start consuming nearby souls and gaining stacking stats, becoming temporarily stronger than at full health. Turns death into a DPS cooldown for each minion.

gems.name: Trickster's Shard
keyStats: Casting the supported spell triggers Fragment Self — creates up to 4 Fractured Mimics
Fractured Mimics last 5 seconds and cast the spell
Supported Spells deal 50% less Damage when cast by Fractured Mimics
Mana Cost: 100%
gems.whyPowerful: 4 Mimics casting the spell = 5 total casts — even with the 50% less damage penalty the net DPS is significantly higher. Mimics are placed around the player and fire outward — effectively creates a burst AoE radius of coverage.

gems.name: Atziri's Allure
keyStats: Curses inflicted by Supported Skills ignore the usual Curse Limit
Curses inflicted by Supported Skills are reflected back to you
Supported Skills have 20% less Curse Effect
Compatible with all 9 curse spells
gems.whyPowerful: Ignoring the curse limit means applying any number of curses to enemies simultaneously — normally capped at 1. The reflected curse is the tradeoff — you also receive the curse effect. Enormous boost for dedicated curse builds that can handle the self-curse penalties.

gems.name: Garukhan's Resolve
keyStats: Maximum Critical Hit chance with Supported Skills is 50%
Attack Critical Hit Chance with Supported Skills Bifurcates
Mana Cost: 100%
gems.whyPowerful: Bifurcating crit chance means whenever you crit, the crit chance is split and applied twice — ensuring all attacks get some crit benefit at the cost of the 50% max cap. Makes crit extremely reliable without fully committing to 100% crit investment.

gems.name: Varashta's Blessing
keyStats: Supported Skills deal 10% more Damage for each different Command Skill you have used in the last 15 seconds
Cannot modify Minion skills
Cost Multiplier: 120%
gems.whyPowerful: Using 4 different Command Skills in any 15-second window grants 40% more Damage — a large multiplicative bonus. Rewards active players who micromanage minion commands rather than a passive summoner style.

gems.name: Xoph's Pyre
keyStats: Supported Skills gain 40% of Fire damage as extra Chaos damage
Chaos damage from Supported Skills contributes to Ignite Buildup and Ignite Magnitude
Cost Multiplier: 120%
gems.whyPowerful: Fire builds gain a substantial bonus Chaos damage output — 40% of fire becomes chaos, bypassing chaos resistance stacking. Chaos damage contributing to Ignite creates a synergistic loop — the extra chaos hits make your ignites stronger.

gems.name: Einhar's Beastrite
keyStats: Killing Blows from Supported Strike Skills against Rare monsters grant two of their Modifiers for 300 seconds
Supported Skills can only damage Low Life enemies
Mana Cost: 100%
gems.whyPowerful: Grants 2 modifiers from killed Rare monsters for 5 minutes — effectively copying enemy buffs. The 'Low Life only' restriction requires a companion skill to bring enemies low first, but the upside is substantial temporary buffs in endgame maps.

gems.name: Her Declaration
keyStats: Enemies entering your Presence while a Supported Skill is active are Intimidated for 4 seconds
Supports Persistent Buff Skills
Spirit Reservation: 30
gems.whyPowerful: Intimidated enemies deal reduced damage to you — effectively a defensive aura that activates whenever enemies approach. Works with any persistent buff (Herald, Aura, Arctic Armour) — extremely flexible socket.

gems.name: Olroth's Hubris
keyStats: Supported Skills cost an additional 20% of maximum Runic Ward
Adds Cold damage equal to 15% of Runic Ward cost
Adds Physical damage equal to 15% of Runic Ward cost
Physical damage from Supported Skills contributes to Freeze Buildup
gems.whyPowerful: Runic Ward (the Warrior's defensive resource) is converted into a damage source — attacks spend shield to deal bonus Physical and Cold damage. Physical damage contributing to Freeze is unusual — melee builds can contribute to freeze buildup without cold investment.

gems.name: Uhtred's Rite
keyStats: Grants Overflowing Chalice when used (1 second duration per 1 second of cooldown)
Supported Skills deal 20% more Damage while any Life Flask is active
Supported Skills gain 20% increased Mana Cost Efficiency during any Mana Flask effect
Mana Cost: 100%
gems.whyPowerful: Ties cooldown skill usage directly to flask uptime — builds that maintain flask uptime gain a free 20% more damage multiplier. Particularly strong on warcry builds that already want flask uptime for other bonuses.

gems.name: Breachlord's Amalgam
keyStats: Projectiles from Supported Skills Return to you
Returning Projectiles from Supported Skills Pierce all targets
Cooldown Time: 6.00 seconds (3 uses)
Mana Cost: 100%
Supports Lightning or Cold damage skills that fire Projectiles
gems.whyPowerful: Projectiles that return pass through every enemy twice (out and back), doubling hit count per projectile. Returning projectiles pierce all targets — every enemy on the return path gets hit regardless of Pierce investment.
